title: Mobile-First Responsive Strategy
content: Breakpoints: sm (640px), md (768px), lg (1024px), xl (1280px). Mobile-first: base styles are mobile, media queries add complexity for larger screens. Key patterns: single-column to multi-column grid, bottom sheet to sidebar for filters, hamburger to horizontal nav, touch targets min 44x44px. Product grid: 1 col (mobile), 2 col (sm), 3 col (md), 4 col (lg).
